pages.rationale: True wide bedroom establish — full night room, pillow-cave, thunder corner readable
Leo arrives — medium-wide holds child + companion + bedroom context
Tiny almost-roar beat — close but not scary wide mouth
Blanket-hide mistake — medium-wide holds readable text + body language + room
Heart line — Leo low and vulnerable, eye-level intimate
Thunder-corner choice — medium holds hands/paws on blanket fold with room context
Soft near-roar turn — single deliberate close-up for intimate faces
Sleepy resolution — warm medium, lamp dimming
